zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Surdeval於1070年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Richard Surdeval48歲，母親Mrs Richard de Surdeval41歲。她和Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1170年在英國英格蘭越可爾斯凱爾頓享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Surdeval was born in 1070, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard Surdeval, was 48 and her mother, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, was 41. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton. She died in 1170, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Surdeval est née en 1070, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Surdeval, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard de Surdeval, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton. Elle est décédée en 1170, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Surdevalが1070年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Surdevalは48歳，母Mrs Richard de Surdevalは41歳であった。彼女はSir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skeltonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1170年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Surdeval(이)가 1070년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Surdeval(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Richard de Surdeval(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Surdeval родилась в 1070 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Surdeval было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard de Surdeval, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет.
